title: Component API
description: Property table with types, defaults, allowed values, and usage notes

sections.props: One row per component property. Required props get a red REQ badge, optional get grey OPT. Include: name, type (string, boolean, enum, number, ReactNode), default value, allowed values (for enums), and usage notes. List ALL props from the component — never truncate.

qualityRules: Every property from the component set must be listed — count them and verify none missing
required field must be true for essential props (the component breaks without them), false for optional
type must be a specific type (enum, string, boolean), never 'any' or 'various'
default must be a concrete value ('false', '"md"', '—' for required props with no default)
values must list ALL allowed values for enum types, pipe-separated
notes must explain what the prop does, not just restate its name
No truncation with '...' or 'and more' in values lists
